title: athyrium polypodiforme
intro: Athyrium polypodiforme, also known as the autumn fern or Japanese polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to Asia, where it is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium polypodiforme include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Athyrium polypodiforme can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
